languages.text: "Что ж, мы закончили. Теперь я готов отвечать на вопросы, Ваше Благородие". {n}Капитан с удовлетворенным видом смыкает пальцы в замок.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Что ж, мы закончили. Теперь я готов отвечать на вопросы, Ваше Благородие". {n}Капитан с удовлетворенным видом смыкает пальцы в замок.{/n}

languages.text: "Well, that will do. I am now willing to answer questions, my {mf|lord|lady}." {n}The captain locks his fingers together with a look of satisfaction.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Что ж, мы закончили. Теперь я готов отвечать на вопросы, Ваше Благородие". {n}Капитан с удовлетворенным видом смыкает пальцы в замок.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Well, that will do. I am now willing to answer questions, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The captain locks his fingers together with a look of satisfaction. You cannot help but feel that this strange conversation was a trap that you have deftly avoided.{/n}

"Well, that will do. I am now willing to answer questions, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The captain locks his fingers together with a look of satisfaction. You cannot help but feel that this strange conversation was a trap that you have deftly avoided.{/n}

"Well, that will do. I am now willing to answer questions, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The captain locks his fingers together with a look of satisfaction. You cannot help but feel that this strange conversation was a trap that you have deftly avoided.{/n}

languages.text: «Bueno, con eso basta. Estoy dispuesto a responder a sus preguntas, mi{mf|lord|lady}». {n}El capitán entrelaza los dedos con una expresión satisfecha.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Well, that will do. I am now willing to answer questions, my {mf|lord|lady}." {n}The captain locks his fingers together with a look of satisfaction.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Bueno, con eso basta. Estoy dispuesto a responder a sus preguntas, mi{mf|lord|lady}». {n}El capitán entrelaza los dedos con una expresión satisfecha.{/n}

languages.text: “很好，这样就可以了。我现在愿意回答问题了，大人。”{n}上尉十指交叉，露出了满意的神色。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Well, that will do. I am now willing to answer questions, my {mf|lord|lady}." {n}The captain locks his fingers together with a look of satisfaction.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “很好，这样就可以了。我现在愿意回答问题了，大人。”{n}上尉十指交叉，露出了满意的神色。{/n}

languages.text: « Sur ce, vous m'avez convaincu. Je suis désormais prêt à répondre à vos questions, Votre Seigneurie. » {n}Le capitaine joint les doigts avec une expression satisfaite.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Well, that will do. I am now willing to answer questions, my {mf|lord|lady}." {n}The captain locks his fingers together with a look of satisfaction.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Sur ce, vous m'avez convaincu. Je suis désormais prêt à répondre à vos questions, Votre Seigneurie. » {n}Le capitaine joint les doigts avec une expression satisfaite.{/n}

languages.text: "Bu kadar yeter. Artık soruları cevaplamaya hazırım {mf|lordum|leydim} Hazretleri." {n}Yüzbaşı, memnun bir ifadeyle parmaklarını birbirine kenetliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Well, that will do. I am now willing to answer questions, my {mf|lord|lady}." {n}The captain locks his fingers together with a look of satisfaction.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bu kadar yeter. Artık soruları cevaplamaya hazırım {mf|lordum|leydim} Hazretleri." {n}Yüzbaşı, memnun bir ifadeyle parmaklarını birbirine kenetliyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Tja, das wird reichen. Ich bin nun bereit, Fragen zu beantworten, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}." {n}Der Captain verschränkt mit einem zufriedenen Blick seine Finger.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Well, that will do. I am now willing to answer questions, my {mf|lord|lady}." {n}The captain locks his fingers together with a look of satisfaction.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Tja, das wird reichen. Ich bin nun bereit, Fragen zu beantworten, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}." {n}Der Captain verschränkt mit einem zufriedenen Blick seine Finger.{/n}

languages.text: 「まあ、それでいいでしょう。私は今、質問に答える準備ができています、私の{mf|主|女主人}。」{n}船長は満足げな顔で指を組みました.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Well, that will do. I am now willing to answer questions, my {mf|lord|lady}." {n}The captain locks his fingers together with a look of satisfaction.{/n}
